sections.paragraph:
Original: גּמר

Transliteration: gâmar

Phonetic: gaw-mar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to end, come to an end, complete, cease
    1. (Qal)
      1. to come to an end, be no more
      2. to bring to an end, complete
  2. (TWOT) to fail, perfect, perform

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 363

Part(s) of speech: Verb
